data.name: Msg_AdminPrivilegesRequired
data.value: Access Denied. Please restart your shell as Administrator to run the '{0}' command.

data.name: Msg_InvalidExecutablePath
data.value: Invalid executable path: {0}. Ensure the file exists and is accessible.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPath
data.value: The specified process path is invalid.

data.name: Msg_WrapperNotFound
data.value: Wrapper executable not found at: %ProgramData%\Servy\Servy.Service.exe. Ensure Servy is properly installed.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPathInConfig
data.value: Invalid {0} in configuration. Ensure the path exists and is accessible.

data.name: Msg_InvalidConfigFileType
data.value: Configuration output file type is required (XML or JSON).

data.name: Msg_ImportRepoFailure
data.value: Failed to import {0} configuration into the repository.

data.name: Msg_ServiceStatusFailure
data.value: Failed to retrieve status for service '{0}'.

data.name: Msg_ImportDeserializationFailure
data.value: Service configuration was imported, but failed to deserialize for installation.

data.name: Msg_ImportInstallSuccess
data.value: {0} configuration saved and service '{1}' installed successfully.

data.name: Msg_ImportInstallLookupFailure
data.value: Service configuration was saved, but the service '{0}' could not be located for installation.

data.name: Msg_ImportInstallGeneralFailure
data.value: Service configuration was saved, but installation failed for service '{0}'.

data.name: Msg_ConfigSizeLimitReached
data.value: Configuration file '{0}' exceeds maximum size (10 MB).

data.name: Msg_ServiceDisabled
data.value: A disabled service with this name already exists. Choose a different name.

data.name: Msg_ServiceNotFound
data.value: The specified service was not found.
